positive: A minimalist, abstract illustration of a roaring cosmic wolf and a stylized full moon silhouette against a deep indigo and sapphire gradient background. The wolf should be composed of geometric, ethereal smoke and starlight, giving it strong contrast and dynamic movement. Below the wolf, incorporate abstract constellations and subtle celestial nebula dust. The style should be modern graphic illustration, vector art quality, with clean lines, perfect symmetry, and dramatic, volumetric lighting. Highly suitable for textile printing on t-shirts or hoodies. Composition must be centered, isolated on a solid background, and graphically impactful. Limited color palette: Deep blues, cosmic purples, silver, and pops of neon aqua for energy.
negative: photorealistic, 3d render, blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, jpeg artifacts, dirty, cluttered, monochrome, grayscale
